data.name: RefereesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a data of competition from the repository.

data.name: MissingEntitiesError
data.value: One or more Library entities are missing.

data.name: RefereeLevelsLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee levels from the repository.

data.name: RefereeJobTitlesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee job titles from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionsStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a competition statuses from the repository.

data.name: DetailedCompetitionStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a competition statuses and names from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataSaveError
data.value: Failed to save the competition data to the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the new competition data to the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove the competition data from the repository.

data.name: RefereeLevelFindError
data.value: Failed to find the referee level from the repository.

data.name: RefereeAddError
data.value: Failed to add referee to list.

data.name: RefereeJobTitleFindError
data.value: Failed to find the referee job titles from the repository.

data.name: RefereeRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove the referee from the repository.

data.name: RefereesSaveError
data.value: Failed to save the list of referee to the repository.
